metadata.description: Process orchestrator for building real UIs: a PRD (or an existing design via design-deconstruct) to running code sandboxed in Storybook

plugins.name: pixel-perfect
plugins.description: 6-phase build process: a PRD (or an existing design via design-deconstruct) → real code → Storybook sandbox. Supports web (React, Next.js, Vite, SvelteKit) and mobile (React Native, Expo) with independent per-platform progression.
